report.summary: Community growth cycle v20 (Mar 16): 3 new pages (ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap, defi-options-trading-guide, hyperliquid-hip3-tokenized-futures-guide) amplified via social calendar filling gaps Mar 17–19 + Mar 23; FOMC Day (Mar 18) reaction tweet drafted; post-FOMC weekly newsletter written; DeFi options P&L social card created (social-defi-options-guide.svg).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tue Mar 17 — Twitter thread (5 posts): Ethereum 2026 upgrade roadmap — Fusaka (8x blobs, 150M gas), Glamsterdam (ePBS removes MEV-Boost relay), Hegota (stateless clients); CTA to /learn/ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap
Tue Mar 17 — Discord/Telegram: Ethereum upgrade guide drop announcement
Wed Mar 18 (FOMC Day) — Twitter: Live rate-cut reaction tweet; stablecoin APY repricing, DCA CTA, tokenized treasury yield compression; links to DCA calculator + stablecoin yield guide
Wed Mar 18 (FOMC Day) — Twitter: DeFi options angle tweet — vol spike post-FOMC, on-chain options now relevant; CTA to /learn/defi-options-trading-guide

Thu Mar 19 — Twitter thread (6 posts): DeFi options deep dive — calls/puts, 4 Greeks (Delta/Gamma/Theta/Vega), 4 protocol comparison (Derive 70%+ share, Stryke, Premia, Panoptic), DOV yield 5–20% APY; CTA to /learn/defi-options-trading-guide

Thu Mar 19 — Full post-FOMC weekly newsletter: market pulse (rate cut recap), 3 new page highlights (DeFi options, ETH roadmap, HIP-3), 2 worth-reading picks (stablecoin yield + restaking), Degen Corner (vol spike + options mechanics)

Mon Mar 23 — Twitter thread (5 posts): Hyperliquid HIP-3 tokenized futures — tokenized perp positions, composable collateral, funding rate routing to yield aggregators; CTA to /learn/hyperliquid-hip3-tokenized-futures-guide
Mon Mar 23 — Discord/Telegram: Hyperliquid HIP-3 guide drop announcement

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-defi-options-guide.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark glass-morphism theme; indigo/cyan/amber brand gradient; left panel: NEW GUIDE 2026 badge, title 'DeFi Options Trading Guide', subtitle with P&L calculator callout, 3 stat chips (+1,000% YoY volume, 70%+ Derive share, 5–20% DOV yield), 4-protocol comparison table (Derive/Premia/Stryke/Panoptic with status dots and monthly vol); right panel: call option P&L chart at expiry (ETH $2,600–$3,800 range, strike $3,200, $120 premium), green profit fill + red loss fill, amber break-even marker, green max-profit point, Greeks reference strip (Delta/Gamma/Theta/Vega); bottom URL bar. Saved to /public/social-defi-options-guide.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: FOMC T-2 (Mar 16): DCA calculator + stablecoin yield pages are in peak search intent window. FOMC Day (Mar 18) reaction tweet prepared for both 'cut' and 'hold' scenarios.
DeFi options: On-chain volume up 10x YoY with Derive holding 70%+ share — brand new page with zero social coverage. FOMC vol spike (Vega sensitivity) creates perfect timing for Mar 18 + Mar 19 push.
Ethereum upgrade roadmap: Glamsterdam (ePBS) is a major ETH narrative for mid-2026. Guide covers Fusaka (already live), Glamsterdam, and Hegota. First social coverage queued Mar 17.
Hyperliquid HIP-3: Tokenized perps composability is Q1 2026's emerging DeFi infrastructure story. Guide is live and unannounced. Social coverage queued Mar 23.

Calendar now complete: v17 (Mon Mar 16 FOMC urgency) + v18 (Sat–Mon Mar 21–23 Aztec) + v19 (Tue Mar 24–Fri Mar 27 restaking/treasuries) + v20 (Tue Mar 17, Wed Mar 18, Thu Mar 19, Mon Mar 23). Full Mar 16–27 rolling calendar covered.
Post-FOMC newsletter (Thu Mar 19): consolidates 3 new pages (defi-options, eth-roadmap, hip3) + FOMC recap + stablecoin yield + restaking. Maximizes post-rate-cut news cycle.
DeFi options social card saved to /public/social-defi-options-guide.svg
